sections.name: Navigation & Live Ticker
sections.guidelines: Floating Crystal Glass navbar (`fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 rounded-full`). Include a Bloomberg-terminal style marquee ticker using `JetBrains Mono` showing live building operations data (e.g., 'HVAC ZONE 4: NOMINAL', 'ENERGY USAGE: -12%').

sections.name: Hero 3D Immersive
sections.guidelines: Full viewport height. Background `#06080D` with an absolute positioned blueprint overlay (opacity 10%). Centerpiece: A react-three-fiber `<Canvas>` containing a glowing wireframe/smart building model. Overlapping the canvas: Floating glassmorphic KPI cards (`glass` surface) displaying real-time mocked stats. Primary CTA 'Request Demo' wired to backend, using a cyan (`#00E5FF`) subtle drop shadow/glow.

sections.name: Control Center Preview
sections.guidelines: Massive `rounded-[28px]` container showcasing the platform dashboard. Use the 'Server Room' image heavily darkened as a background texture. Overlay dashboard UI elements (Recharts charts, data tables) floating in 3D perspective using Framer Motion.

sections.name: Bento Grid Features
sections.guidelines: Asymmetrical 12-column bento grid. Items use `card` surface. Modules: HVAC, Fire Detection, CCTV, Access Control, Lighting, Energy Analytics. Apply generous padding (`p-8`). Add hover states that introduce a subtle cyan or teal glow.

sections.name: AI Workflow & Integrations Orbit
sections.guidelines: Workflow: Horizontal timeline connecting Sensor → AI Engine → Decision → Action. Use animated dashed SVG lines. Integrations: Central BMS core with orbiting nodes representing BACnet, Modbus, Microsoft, SAP, AWS, IoT. Implement smooth continuous rotation via Framer Motion.

sections.name: Security & Analytics Comparison
sections.guidelines: Floating cards for Security (RBAC, Zero Trust, SOC2). High-contrast comparison table (Traditional vs Our Platform) with sharp borders, using Teal for positive ticks and Muted for negative/traditional traits.

sections.name: Footer & CTA
sections.guidelines: Immersive 'Start Building' section. Massive text scale (`text-5xl md:text-7xl+`), using `Outfit` tracking-tighter. Simple minimal footer with grid borders.

libraries.install_command: npm install framer-motion lucide-react @phosphor-icons/react @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei three react-fast-marquee recharts clsx tailwind-merge

testing.guidelines: All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid='hero-cta-demo'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark mode palette. Do not use white backgrounds.
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for layout structure; apply Shadcn heavily customized with our `card` and `border` colors for interactive elements like Select, Dialog, or Forms.
The 3D hero visualization MUST be implemented using @react-three/fiber. Do not use a static image for the hero.
Ensure `data-testid` is added to all buttons, links, and form inputs.
Bento grid items must be direct children of the grid container to allow Tailwind grid spans to work correctly.
Avoid generic 'Inter' for headings. Apply `Outfit` for display and `IBM Plex Sans` for body text. Add standard <link> imports for these in index.html.
Do not use generic solid gradients. Use radial gradients or shadow glows to simulate ambient LED light.
